data.content: @azure-typespec-author I added `...Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentityProperty;` which updates all my existing API versions and introduces a breaking change. I want to introduce the properties of the spread model '...ManagedServiceIdentityProperty' in API version 2025-05-04-preview only.

arguments.request: I added `...Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentityProperty;` to my resource model which spreads identity properties into all API versions, introducing a breaking change in earlier versions. I want to introduce the properties from `...ManagedServiceIdentityProperty` only starting from API version 2025-05-04-preview. How do I use versioning decorators or other techniques to add spread model properties to a specific API version only, without affecting prior versions?

stimulus.name: 001001-version-spread-property-forced
stimulus.prompt: @azure-typespec-author I added `...Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentityProperty;` which updates all my existing API versions and introduces a breaking change. I want to introduce the properties of the spread model '...ManagedServiceIdentityProperty' in API version 2025-05-04-preview only.

config.prompt: Verify changes are scoped to this task only, with no unrelated edits beyond introducing preview-only identity via versioning.
